ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_voter_registration" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "county_county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "candidate_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the candidate */,
  "candidate_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "candidate_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* Website of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "party_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the current leader of the party */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* Website of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "election_voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "election_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "share" REAL /* Share of votes the candidate received */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the candidate received */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., provisional, final) */,
  "result_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the county for the election */,
  "result_voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage in the county for the election */,
  "result_precincts_reporting" INTEGER /* Number of precincts reporting results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES analysts ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES election_officials ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES admins ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the official is assigned to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., chief, deputy) */,
  "official_start_date" TEXT /* Date the official started their role */,
  "official_end_date" TEXT /* Date the official ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an analyst */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the analyst is assigned to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., lead, junior) */,
  "analyst_start_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst started their role */,
  "analyst_end_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super, normal) */,
  "admin_start_date" TEXT /* Date the admin started their role */,
  "admin_end_date" TEXT /* Date the admin ended their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical election */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of the historical election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "history_status" TEXT /* Status of the historical election (e.g., completed) */,
  "history_voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the historical election */,
  "history_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the historical election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical candidate */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate participated in */,
  "history_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result for the historical candidate (e.g., provisional, final) */,
  "history_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the county for the historical election */,
  "history_voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage in the county for the historical election */,
  "history_precincts_reporting" INTEGER /* Number of precincts reporting results for the historical election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_history_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_history_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical party */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "history_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "history_leader" TEXT /* Name of the current leader of the party */,
  "history_website" TEXT /* Website of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_history_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)
